feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: UP: Mohoba Hospital में भरा पानी, Priyanka Gandhi का Yogi Governmnet पर हमला वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: UP: Mohoba Hospital में भरा पानी, Priyanka Gandhi का Yogi Governmnet पर हमला वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Congress National General Secretary Priyanka Gandhi Vadra is constantly attacking the Yogi government through tweets. In his latest tweet, he has targeted the government by tweeting a video of rainwater filling the government hospital in Mahoba. He has written in his tweet that Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath, who has given a statement on the health facilities in Lucknow, is not interested in improving these conditions but in hiding.
कांग्रेस महासचिव प्रियंका गांधी उत्तर प्रदेश की योगी सरकार पर लगातार हमलावर हैं. कभी करोना वायरस तो कभी प्रदेश की कानून व्यवस्था को लेकर सवाल खड़े करती रही हैं. इस बार प्रियंका गांधी ने महोबा जिला अस्पताल में पानी भरने को लेकर योगी सरकार को निशाने पर लिया है. उन्होंने अस्पताल का वीडियो शेयर कर स्वास्थ्य सुविधाओं पर सवाल उठाए हैं
#PriyankaGandhi #UttarPradesh #YogiAdityanath
entry.summary: Congress National General Secretary Priyanka Gandhi Vadra is constantly attacking the Yogi government through tweets. In his latest tweet, he has targeted the government by tweeting a video of rainwater filling the government hospital in Mahoba. He has written in his tweet that Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath, who has given a statement on the health facilities in Lucknow, is not interested in improving these conditions but in hiding. कांग्रेस महासचिव प्रियंका गांधी उत्तर प्रदेश की योगी सरकार पर लगातार हमलावर हैं. कभी करोना वायरस तो कभी प्रदेश की कानून व्यवस्था को लेकर सवाल खड़े करती रही हैं. इस बार प्रियंका गांधी ने महोबा जिला अस्पताल में पानी भरने को लेकर योगी सरकार को निशाने पर लिया है. उन्होंने अस्पताल का वीडियो शेयर कर स्वास्थ्य सुविधाओं पर सवाल उठाए हैं #PriyankaGandhi #UttarPradesh #YogiAdityanath

entry.title: The Only Female Tetraplegic Racing Driver In The World Nathalie McGloin Brings More People To The Track

link.title: The Only Female Tetraplegic Racing Driver In The World Nathalie McGloin Brings More People To The Track

entry.content: Tetraplegic racer Nathalie McGloin wants people with disabilities to experience what it’s like to speed around a track. She founded Spinal Track to let them do just that. After breaked her spine in a car injury when she was at school, McGloin decided she wasn’t going to let her injury stop her from doing whatever she wanted. Now she races a hand-controlled Cayman S in the Porsche Club Championship and Classic Sports Car Club, competing against able-bodied men.
entry.summary: Tetraplegic racer Nathalie McGloin wants people with disabilities to experience what it’s like to speed around a track. She founded Spinal Track to let them do just that. After breaked her spine in a car injury when she was at school, McGloin decided she wasn’t going to let her injury stop her from doing whatever she wanted. Now she races a hand-controlled Cayman S in the Porsche Club Championship and Classic Sports Car Club, competing against able-bodied men.

entry.title: JioMart Set To Become Largest E-grocer Oneindia Telugu

link.title: JioMart Set To Become Largest E-grocer Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
Within a few days of its launch, Reliance Retail-owned JioMart app has been catching up faster and has crossed the one million downloads mark on the Google Play Store and is one of the top three apps in the ‘Shopping’ category.
#Jio
#JioMart
#Amazon
#Flipkart
#Bigbasket
#Jioplatforms
#Mukeshambani
#Amazonpantry
]
సంచలనాలకు మారు పేరు ముకేశ్ అంబానీ. అయన సంస్థ రిలయన్స్ ఇండస్ట్రీస్ ఇప్పటికే అనేక సంచలనాలు సృష్టించిన విషయం తెలిసిందే. రిలయన్స్ జియో సేవలు ప్రారంభించి ఇండియా లోనే కాదు ప్రపంచం మొత్తం దృష్టిని తమ వైపుకు తిప్పుకున్నారు. దానిని ప్రారంభించిన కేవలం 3 ఏళ్లలో దేశంలో రెండో అతిపెద్ద టెలికాం సంస్థగా తీర్చిదిద్దటం చూశాం.
entry.summary: Within a few days of its launch, Reliance Retail-owned JioMart app has been catching up faster and has crossed the one million downloads mark on the Google Play Store and is one of the top three apps in the ‘Shopping’ category. #Jio #JioMart #Amazon #Flipkart #Bigbasket #Jioplatforms #Mukeshambani #Amazonpantry ] సంచలనాలకు మారు పేరు ముకేశ్ అంబానీ. అయన సంస్థ రిలయన్స్ ఇండస్ట్రీస్ ఇప్పటికే అనేక సంచలనాలు సృష్టించిన విషయం తెలిసిందే. రిలయన్స్ జియో సేవలు ప్రారంభించి ఇండియా లోనే కాదు ప్రపంచం మొత్తం దృష్టిని తమ వైపుకు తిప్పుకున్నారు. దానిని ప్రారంభించిన కేవలం 3 ఏళ్లలో దేశంలో రెండో అతిపెద్ద టెలికాం సంస్థగా తీర్చిదిద్దటం చూశాం.

entry.title: Republican Senator Tom Cotton Of Arkansas Calls Slavery A ‘Necessary Evil’

link.title: Republican Senator Tom Cotton Of Arkansas Calls Slavery A ‘Necessary Evil’

entry.content:
Republican Sen. Tom Cotton of Arkansas has described slavery as a "necessary evil".
The 1619 Project is an initiative from The New York Times, according to reports CNN.
It reframes American history of August 1619, when the first slave ship arrived on America’s shores.
"As the founding fathers said, it was the necessary evil upon which the union was built." Tom Cotton
Cotton then called the 1619 Project "a racially divisive, revisionist account of history."
Cotton now claims he was citing the views of America’s founding fathers, rather than his own.
However, Cotton introduced legislation to prevent funding for schools that teach the 1619 Project.
"(The 1619 Project) denies the noble principles of freedom and equality on which our nation was founded. Not a single cent of federal funding should go to indoctrinate young Americans with this left-wing garbage."
There is no record of any Founding Fathers arguing US slavery was a "necessary evil."
entry.summary: Republican Sen. Tom Cotton of Arkansas has described slavery as a "necessary evil". The 1619 Project is an initiative from The New York Times, according to reports CNN. It reframes American history of August 1619, when the first slave ship arrived on America’s shores. "As the founding fathers said, it was the necessary evil upon which the union was built." Tom Cotton Cotton then called the 1619 Project "a racially divisive, revisionist account of history." Cotton now claims he was citing the views of America’s founding fathers, rather than his own. However, Cotton introduced legislation to prevent funding for schools that teach the 1619 Project. "(The 1619 Project) denies the noble principles of freedom and equality on which our nation was founded. Not a single cent of federal funding should go to indoctrinate young Americans with this left-wing garbage." There is no record of any Founding Fathers arguing US slavery was a "necessary evil."

‘Love Island’ star Maura Higgins has revealed she hopes men aren’t "intimidated" by her.
Maura Higgins hopes men aren’t ‘intimidated’ by her.
Maura Higgins hopes men aren’t ‘intimidated’ by her.
Maura Higgins hopes men aren't 'intimidated' by her.
entry.summary: ‘Love Island’ star Maura Higgins has revealed she hopes men aren’t "intimidated" by her.Maura Higgins hopes men aren’t ‘intimidated’ by her. Maura Higgins hopes men aren’t ‘intimidated’ by her. Maura Higgins hopes men aren't 'intimidated' by her.

entry.title: Dilraba Dilmurat, Wanita Uighur Tercantik se-Asia!

link.title: Dilraba Dilmurat, Wanita Uighur Tercantik se-Asia!

entry.content:
VIVA – Nama aktris Tiongkok Dilraba Dilmurat cukup dikenal di kalangan pecinta drama mandarin. Baru-baru ini perannya di serial drama Cinta Abadi Seindah Mimpi, sukses mencuri hati penonton.
Tak hanya piawai bermain peran, kecantikan Dilraba ternyata juga menggema di kancah internasional, ia dinobatkan menjadi wanita tercantik se Asia versi majalah fashion internasional ternama, I-Magazine pada tahun 2017.
Pembuktian itu ia dapatkan setelah melalui proses seleksi oleh lebih dari 350 multinasional fotografer, desainer, make up artist dan editor majalah, Dilireba berhasil mengalahkan ratusan wanita dari 30 negara. #DilrabaDilmurat
entry.summary: VIVA – Nama aktris Tiongkok Dilraba Dilmurat cukup dikenal di kalangan pecinta drama mandarin. Baru-baru ini perannya di serial drama Cinta Abadi Seindah Mimpi, sukses mencuri hati penonton. Tak hanya piawai bermain peran, kecantikan Dilraba ternyata juga menggema di kancah internasional, ia dinobatkan menjadi wanita tercantik se Asia versi majalah fashion internasional ternama, I-Magazine pada tahun 2017. Pembuktian itu ia dapatkan setelah melalui proses seleksi oleh lebih dari 350 multinasional fotografer, desainer, make up artist dan editor majalah, Dilireba berhasil mengalahkan ratusan wanita dari 30 negara. #DilrabaDilmurat

entry.title: Dans les coulisses de Koh-Lantess, le Koh-Lanta des quartiers REPORTAGE

link.title: Dans les coulisses de Koh-Lantess, le Koh-Lanta des quartiers REPORTAGE

entry.content: Il a lancé Koh-Lantess, le Koh-Lanta des quartiers avec des épreuves remixées. Djibril, le Denis Brogniart du 94, nous a accueillis sur le tournage du prochain épisode, à base de lacrymo et de poulpe au chocolat.
entry.summary: Il a lancé Koh-Lantess, le Koh-Lanta des quartiers avec des épreuves remixées. Djibril, le Denis Brogniart du 94, nous a accueillis sur le tournage du prochain épisode, à base de lacrymo et de poulpe au chocolat.

entry.title: BJP MLA Shyam Prakash ने भ्रष्टाचार पर Yogi सरकार को घेरा! Uttar Pradesh वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: BJP MLA Shyam Prakash ने भ्रष्टाचार पर Yogi सरकार को घेरा! Uttar Pradesh वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
BJP MLAs continue to raise the issue of corruption in their government as once again the law maker from Gopamau in Hardoi, Shyam Prakash, wrote a post on his FB page saying this government is the most corrupt government in the history of Uttar Pradesh.Watch video,
यूपी के एक बीजेपी विधायक ने भ्रष्टाचार को लेकर अपनी ही सरकार पर सवाल उठाए हैं. गोपामऊ विधानसभा क्षेत्र से बीजेपी विधायक श्याम प्रकाश ने कहा कि अपने राजनीतिक जीवन में इतना भ्रष्टाचार आज तक नहीं देखा. हालांकि उन्होंने ये बात फेसबुक पर पोस्ट के जरिए कही. लेकिन जब उनकी पोस्ट को लेकर ज्यादा बवाल मचने लगा तो उन्होंने अपनी पोस्ट डिलीट भी कर दी है.पूरी जानकारी के लिए ये वीडियो देखें
#BJPMLAShyamPrakash #YogiGovt #UttarPradesh
entry.summary: BJP MLAs continue to raise the issue of corruption in their government as once again the law maker from Gopamau in Hardoi, Shyam Prakash, wrote a post on his FB page saying this government is the most corrupt government in the history of Uttar Pradesh.Watch video, यूपी के एक बीजेपी विधायक ने भ्रष्टाचार को लेकर अपनी ही सरकार पर सवाल उठाए हैं. गोपामऊ विधानसभा क्षेत्र से बीजेपी विधायक श्याम प्रकाश ने कहा कि अपने राजनीतिक जीवन में इतना भ्रष्टाचार आज तक नहीं देखा. हालांकि उन्होंने ये बात फेसबुक पर पोस्ट के जरिए कही. लेकिन जब उनकी पोस्ट को लेकर ज्यादा बवाल मचने लगा तो उन्होंने अपनी पोस्ट डिलीट भी कर दी है.पूरी जानकारी के लिए ये वीडियो देखें #BJPMLAShyamPrakash #YogiGovt #UttarPradesh

entry.title: Ilhan Omar Predicted To Lose Primary

link.title: Ilhan Omar Predicted To Lose Primary

entry.content:
Minnesota Rep. Ilhan Omar represents Minneapolis, Minnesota in congress.
She is facing a stiff primary challenge from lawyer Antone Melton-Meaux.
Melton-Meaux raised an absurd $3.2 million in the second quarter of this year to Omar’s $471,000.
Omar represents a sizable Jewish community in her district.
She has been the face of multiple national controversies for her perceived use of coded anti-Semitic language.
Slate reports there’s a new round of controversy brewing about the language with which Omar’s mailers criticize Melton-Meaux’s donors.
Omar is also languishing in the polls behind Melton-Meaux.
entry.summary: Minnesota Rep. Ilhan Omar represents Minneapolis, Minnesota in congress. She is facing a stiff primary challenge from lawyer Antone Melton-Meaux. Melton-Meaux raised an absurd $3.2 million in the second quarter of this year to Omar’s $471,000. Omar represents a sizable Jewish community in her district. She has been the face of multiple national controversies for her perceived use of coded anti-Semitic language. Slate reports there’s a new round of controversy brewing about the language with which Omar’s mailers criticize Melton-Meaux’s donors. Omar is also languishing in the polls behind Melton-Meaux.

entry.title: Bande-annonce Comic-Con de Truth Seekers, série Amazon avec Simon Pegg et Nick Frost (vo)

entry.content: Une comédie surnaturelle qui suit groupe d’enquêteurs paranormaux à temps partiel, qui s’unit pour découvrir une conspiration mortelle.

entry.title: Coronavirus Medicine : वैज्ञानिकों ने की कोरोना को रोकने वाली 21दवाओं की पहचान वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Coronavirus Medicine : वैज्ञानिकों ने की कोरोना को रोकने वाली 21दवाओं की पहचान वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Scientists engaged in the discovery of the corona virus vaccine have found another breakthrough. Scientists have discovered 21 existing drugs that are helpful in preventing the corona from replicating, ie, increasing its numbers, these drugs were identified during an investigation in the lab. Apart from scientists of the institute, scientists from many countries including Indian origin are involved.
कोरोना वायरस की वैक्सीन की खोज में लगे वैज्ञानिकों ने एक और सफलता पाई है। वैज्ञानिकों ने 21 ऐसी मौजूदा दवाओं का पता लगाया है जो कोरोना को प्रतिरूप बनाने यानी अपनी संख्या बढ़ाने से रोकने में मददगार हैं,,,लैब में एक जांच के दौरान इन दवाओं की पहचान की गई।इस रिसर्च में अमेरिका के सैनफोर्ड बर्नहम प्रीबाईस मेडिकल डिस्कवरी इंस्टीट्यूट के वैज्ञानिकों के अलावा भारतीय मूल समेत कई देशों के वैज्ञानिक शामिल हैं।
#Coronavirus #CoronavirusMedicine
entry.summary: Scientists engaged in the discovery of the corona virus vaccine have found another breakthrough. Scientists have discovered 21 existing drugs that are helpful in preventing the corona from replicating, ie, increasing its numbers, these drugs were identified during an investigation in the lab. Apart from scientists of the institute, scientists from many countries including Indian origin are involved. कोरोना वायरस की वैक्सीन की खोज में लगे वैज्ञानिकों ने एक और सफलता पाई है। वैज्ञानिकों ने 21 ऐसी मौजूदा दवाओं का पता लगाया है जो कोरोना को प्रतिरूप बनाने यानी अपनी संख्या बढ़ाने से रोकने में मददगार हैं,,,लैब में एक जांच के दौरान इन दवाओं की पहचान की गई।इस रिसर्च में अमेरिका के सैनफोर्ड बर्नहम प्रीबाईस मेडिकल डिस्कवरी इंस्टीट्यूट के वैज्ञानिकों के अलावा भारतीय मूल समेत कई देशों के वैज्ञानिक शामिल हैं। #Coronavirus #CoronavirusMedicine

entry.title: Tour de France 2020 - Top Moments LCL : Fignon

link.title: Tour de France 2020 - Top Moments LCL : Fignon

entry.content:
Laurent Fignon, dernier coureur à avoir remporté le Tour lors de sa première participation en 1983 et double vainqueur.
Laurent Fignon, last rider to win the Tour de France for his first participation, and double winner.
entry.summary: Laurent Fignon, dernier coureur à avoir remporté le Tour lors de sa première participation en 1983 et double vainqueur. Laurent Fignon, last rider to win the Tour de France for his first participation, and double winner.

entry.title: Pemakzulan Bupati Jember, Mendagri: Tunggu Keputusan MA

link.title: Pemakzulan Bupati Jember, Mendagri: Tunggu Keputusan MA

entry.content:
JEMBER, KOMPAS.TV - Salah satu bukti yang dibawa yakni data tentang dugaan mal administrasi dan dugaan tindak korupsi pengadaan barang dan jasa.
Wakil Ketua Komisi C DPRD Jember, David Handoko Seto menyatakan, data yang disiapkan berupa berkas berita acara atupun soft copy dari proses jalannya sidang interpeasi dan hak angket.
Berkas yang akan dikirim ke Mahkamah Agung di antaranya juga data informasi dugaan pelanggaran adanya mal administrasi, dan dugaan tindak korupsi pengadaan barang dan jasa.
Sejak pemakzulan Bupati Jember, Faida, halaman kantor DPRD Jember, dipenuhi poster dan karangan bunga sebagai bentuk dukungan dari keputusan pemakzulan Bupati.
Pemakzulan Bupati Jember, Faida, oleh DPRD setempat, ditanggapi Kementerian Dalam Negeri.
Kemendagri menyatakan tahap pemakzulan harus dilalui sesuai hukum, yakni pelaporan ke Mahkamah Agung.
Kemendagri menunggu putusan MA, untuk menentukan tindak lanjut pemakzulan.
entry.summary: JEMBER, KOMPAS.TV - Salah satu bukti yang dibawa yakni data tentang dugaan mal administrasi dan dugaan tindak korupsi pengadaan barang dan jasa. Wakil Ketua Komisi C DPRD Jember, David Handoko Seto menyatakan, data yang disiapkan berupa berkas berita acara atupun soft copy dari proses jalannya sidang interpeasi dan hak angket. Berkas yang akan dikirim ke Mahkamah Agung di antaranya juga data informasi dugaan pelanggaran adanya mal administrasi, dan dugaan tindak korupsi pengadaan barang dan jasa. Sejak pemakzulan Bupati Jember, Faida, halaman kantor DPRD Jember, dipenuhi poster dan karangan bunga sebagai bentuk dukungan dari keputusan pemakzulan Bupati. Pemakzulan Bupati Jember, Faida, oleh DPRD setempat, ditanggapi Kementerian Dalam Negeri. Kemendagri menyatakan tahap pemakzulan harus dilalui sesuai hukum, yakni pelaporan ke Mahkamah Agung. Kemendagri menunggu putusan MA, untuk menentukan tindak lanjut pemakzulan.

entry.title: Amber Heard : ce texto à sa mère qui contredit ses accusations de violence

link.title: Amber Heard : ce texto à sa mère qui contredit ses accusations de violence

entry.content: Amber Heard : ce texto à sa mère qui contredit ses accusations de violence.Amber Heard est appelée une nouvelle fois à la barre du procès intenté par Johnny Depp contre le groupe NGN pour diffamation.Elle a été contrainte d’avouer qu’elle avait menti à sa mère, Paige Parsons. .En effet, dans un échange par texto avec elle, morte au mois de mai 2020, l’actrice affirmait que son ex-mari ne l’avait jamais frappée. .Il n’est pas violent avec moi. Il est juste furieux en général, Amber Heard.Interrogée par Sasha Wass, l’avocate représentant NGN, Amber Heard a expliqué pourquoi elle affirme avoir menti à sa mère.Je ne voulais pas qu’elle le dise à mon père, Amber Heard.Car, comme elle l’a ensuite rappelé, David Heard a un passé d’homme violent en proie aux addictions.Il avait d’ailleurs menacé Johnny Depp de mort.Quand il était sobre, Johnny pouvait être merveilleux, précieux, généreux et aimant. C’est un homme remarquable quand il est comme ça. Je l’aimais. Je ne voulais pas perdre ça (…) En lui se trouvait un monstre, Amber Heard.Ce jeudi 23 juillet, Amber Heard cédera sa place à sa sœur, Whitney Heard. .Elle l’aurait défendue d’une attaque de Johnny Depp en 2015.Il allait la pousser dans les escaliers et, au moment où c’est arrivé, je me suis rappelée avoir entendu qu’il avait poussé une ancienne petite amie -Kate Moss, je crois- dans les escaliers, Amber Heard.Reste à savoir si Whitney Heard pourra éclairer la justice au sujet de cette altercation
entry.summary: Amber Heard : ce texto à sa mère qui contredit ses accusations de violence.Amber Heard est appelée une nouvelle fois à la barre du procès intenté par Johnny Depp contre le groupe NGN pour diffamation.Elle a été contrainte d’avouer qu’elle avait menti à sa mère, Paige Parsons. .En effet, dans un échange par texto avec elle, morte au mois de mai 2020, l’actrice affirmait que son ex-mari ne l’avait jamais frappée. .Il n’est pas violent avec moi. Il est juste furieux en général, Amber Heard.Interrogée par Sasha Wass, l’avocate représentant NGN, Amber Heard a expliqué pourquoi elle affirme avoir menti à sa mère.Je ne voulais pas qu’elle le dise à mon père, Amber Heard.Car, comme elle l’a ensuite rappelé, David Heard a un passé d’homme violent en proie aux addictions.Il avait d’ailleurs menacé Johnny Depp de mort.Quand il était sobre, Johnny pouvait être merveilleux, précieux, généreux et aimant. C’est un homme remarquable quand il est comme ça. Je l’aimais. Je ne voulais pas perdre ça (…) En lui se trouvait un monstre, Amber Heard.Ce jeudi 23 juillet, Amber Heard cédera sa place à sa sœur, Whitney Heard. .Elle l’aurait défendue d’une attaque de Johnny Depp en 2015.Il allait la pousser dans les escaliers et, au moment où c’est arrivé, je me suis rappelée avoir entendu qu’il avait poussé une ancienne petite amie -Kate Moss, je crois- dans les escaliers, Amber Heard.Reste à savoir si Whitney Heard pourra éclairer la justice au sujet de cette altercation

entry.title: Beware Of This Things While Buying Gold

link.title: Beware Of This Things While Buying Gold

entry.content:
ജ്വല്ലറികളില്‍ കള്ളക്കടത്ത് സ്വര്‍ണ്ണം കൂടുന്നു
അന്വേഷണം വന്നാല്‍ ബില്ല് കയ്യിലില്ലെങ്കില്‍ നിങ്ങളുടെ കയ്യിലുള്ളത് കള്ളക്കടത്ത് സ്വര്‍ണമോ അനധികൃത സ്വര്‍ണമോ ആണെന്ന നിഗമനത്തില്‍ ഉദ്യോഗസ്ഥര്‍ എത്തിച്ചേര്‍ന്നാല്‍ ഒന്നും ചെയ്യാനാവില്ലെന്നും വ്യാപാരികള്‍ പറയുന്നു.
entry.summary: ജ്വല്ലറികളില്‍ കള്ളക്കടത്ത് സ്വര്‍ണ്ണം കൂടുന്നു അന്വേഷണം വന്നാല്‍ ബില്ല് കയ്യിലില്ലെങ്കില്‍ നിങ്ങളുടെ കയ്യിലുള്ളത് കള്ളക്കടത്ത് സ്വര്‍ണമോ അനധികൃത സ്വര്‍ണമോ ആണെന്ന നിഗമനത്തില്‍ ഉദ്യോഗസ്ഥര്‍ എത്തിച്ചേര്‍ന്നാല്‍ ഒന്നും ചെയ്യാനാവില്ലെന്നും വ്യാപാരികള്‍ പറയുന്നു.

entry.title: Modi Government Plans Mass Privatisation Amid Coronavirus Crisis

link.title: Modi Government Plans Mass Privatisation Amid Coronavirus Crisis

entry.content:
While India faces the worst crisis of pandemic and suffering economy, the Narendra Modi government at the Center is preparing to move on the path of mass privatization. The finance ministry has asked the think tank NITI Aayog to prepare a plan to sell the assets in the next 5 years.
#NITIAAyog #NarendraModi #Pandemic #Modigovernment #FICCI #BJP #Congress
entry.summary: While India faces the worst crisis of pandemic and suffering economy, the Narendra Modi government at the Center is preparing to move on the path of mass privatization. The finance ministry has asked the think tank NITI Aayog to prepare a plan to sell the assets in the next 5 years. #NITIAAyog #NarendraModi #Pandemic #Modigovernment #FICCI #BJP #Congress

entry.title: Ertugrul Ghazi Season 4 Episode 6 Urdu hindi Subtitles Dirilis Ertugrul Ghazi PTV TRT

link.title: Ertugrul Ghazi Season 4 Episode 6 Urdu hindi Subtitles Dirilis Ertugrul Ghazi PTV TRT

entry.content:
Ertugrul Ghazi Season 4 Episode 7 Urdu hindi Subtitles Dirilis Ertugrul Ghazi PTV TRT
Share link:
Please Follow my videos to stay in touch with more videos.
ertugrul, ertugrul ghazi, ertugrul ghazi Urdu, dirilis ertugrul, resurrection ertugrul, ertugrul season 3, etugrul season 2 urdu, turkish drama urdu dub, dirilis etugrul urdu, ertugrul ghazi in urdu, ptv, ptv home, ertugurl urdu, resurrection ertugrul season 3, urdu, trt, ertugrul trt, etugrul ptv, ertugurl dubbing, turkish drama Urdu, turkish drama, Ertugrul Ghazi Urdu Season 3,
The heroic story of Ertugrul Ghazi, the daddy of Osman (Uthman) who founded the Ottoman Empire. —Tamimi. Edit Report This. This series is about the Turkish warrior Ertugrul from the 13th century, one among the foremost famous warriors of his time and also the daddy of Osman (the founder of the Ottoman Empire). The show is predicated on the history of the Muslim Oghuz Turks and takes place within the 13th century. It centers around the lifetime of Ertuğrul, the daddy of Osman I, who was the founding father of the Ottoman Empire. it’s been well received, particularly within the Muslim world.
entry.summary: Ertugrul Ghazi Season 4 Episode 7 Urdu hindi Subtitles Dirilis Ertugrul Ghazi PTV TRT Share link: Please Follow my videos to stay in touch with more videos. ertugrul, ertugrul ghazi, ertugrul ghazi Urdu, dirilis ertugrul, resurrection ertugrul, ertugrul season 3, etugrul season 2 urdu, turkish drama urdu dub, dirilis etugrul urdu, ertugrul ghazi in urdu, ptv, ptv home, ertugurl urdu, resurrection ertugrul season 3, urdu, trt, ertugrul trt, etugrul ptv, ertugurl dubbing, turkish drama Urdu, turkish drama, Ertugrul Ghazi Urdu Season 3, The heroic story of Ertugrul Ghazi, the daddy of Osman (Uthman) who founded the Ottoman Empire. —Tamimi. Edit Report This. This series is about the Turkish warrior Ertugrul from the 13th century, one among the foremost famous warriors of his time and also the daddy of Osman (the founder of the Ottoman Empire). The show is predicated on the history of the Muslim Oghuz Turks and takes place within the 13th century. It centers around the lifetime of Ertuğrul, the daddy of Osman I, who was the founding father of the Ottoman Empire. it’s been well received, particularly within the Muslim world.

entry.title: Piojo Herrera reveló que analizan a 4 jugadores como opciones para refuerzos

link.title: Piojo Herrera reveló que analizan a 4 jugadores como opciones para refuerzos

entry.content: El técnico de América explicó que la directiva ya preguntó por esos futbolistas, pero aún no toma una decisión definitiva
entry.summary: El técnico de América explicó que la directiva ya preguntó por esos futbolistas, pero aún no toma una decisión definitiva
